test.name: Extract assertions from the 1870 census — John Baker/Becker Sr. household
test.description: 1870 U.S. Census household of John Baker (indexed variant of Becker), Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio (ark:/61903/1:1:M62F-BST). Real record from the Ferber/Becker research (#799). Documents John (b. 1845) as a child in his parents' household. Pre-1880 census: no relationship column, so household relationships are inferred.

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this 1870 U.S. Census household:

United States, Census, 1870 - Household of John Baker
Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio, United States
FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:M62F-BST

- John Baker - male, born about 1822, Bavaria
- Barbara Baker - female, born about 1825, Bavaria
- John Baker - male, born about 1845, Ohio
- Edward Baker - male, born about 1848, Ohio
- Rosa Baker - female, born about 1852, Ohio
- Robert Baker - male, born about 1855, Ohio
- Lena Baker - female, born about 1861, Ohio
- Caroline Baker - female, born about 1867, Ohio

(1870 U.S. Census - the household is enumerated with no relationship-to-head-of-household column.)

judge_context: The 1870 census has NO relationship-to-head column (that begins in 1880), so any family structure - John Sr. & Barbara as a couple, the younger people as their children - is INDIRECT evidence inferred from household position/age, not stated

Surname is indexed as 'Baker' - extract it as stated ('Baker'); flagging it as a likely variant of the German 'Becker' is good practice, but the assertion value must not be silently 'corrected' to Becker
Atomic assertions per person: separate entries for name, birth year, and birthplace
Birthplaces (Bavaria for the parents, Ohio for the children) are DIRECT (stated); birth years are derived from stated age, so they are INDIRECT
Pre-1940 census: the household informant is unknown, so information quality for names/ages/birthplaces is indeterminate; the enumerator is the recorder
Source classification is DERIVATIVE - the FamilySearch indexed transcription of the 1870 population schedule
Do NOT fabricate a relationship assertion tying these people to Emma Becker or to any Kramer household - this record only shows the John Baker household as enumerated
